hero.subtitle: Lightning-fast architectures designed to capture leads and outshine the competition. We build the spark, you drive the growth.

services.headline: We don't charge by the hour. We charge for value, speed, and clean code that converts. Pick your foundation.

partnership.headline: You design the experience. I build the engine.
partnership.description: Stop fighting with page builders and technical limits. You focus on creating stunning designs in Figma, and I will translate them into lightning-fast, high-converting code. Let's deliver premium digital products together.

pillars.title: Pixel-Perfect Development
pillars.description: Your Figma file is my blueprint. Every margin, typography, and animation is respected.

pillars.title: Zero Tech Headaches
pillars.description: I handle modern frameworks (Astro/Next.js), Core Web Vitals, technical SEO, and flawless responsive behavior.

pillars.title: White-Label Delivery
pillars.description: I work as your technical partner in the shadows. You own the client relationship, I make sure the code is flawless.

hero.titleLight: Built for speed. Perfect for validating ideas.
hero.subtitle: We build lightning-fast, mobile-first single-page websites designed to capture leads and rank as top sources on AI search engines.

features.title: Lightning Fast
features.description: Built with Astro to guarantee a perfect 100/100 Lighthouse score. Zero JavaScript bloat, ensuring your site loads instantly.

features.title: Mobile-First Design
features.description: Flawless experience on every device. Over 70% of web traffic is mobile, we build for it first so you never lose a single lead.

features.title: AI-Ready SEO
features.description: Clean HTML structure and semantic markup optimized for both traditional Google algorithms and AI engines like ChatGPT.

features.title: Lead Capture
features.description: Integrated contact forms connected directly to your email or preferred CRM workspace to validate your ideas instantly.

finalCta.headline: Ready to build your engine?

hero.subtitle: A robust, scalable platform designed for established brands. We combine dynamic content management with flawless front-end performance so you can edit content easily without breaking the design.

features.title: Headless CMS Integration
features.description: Manage your content effortlessly with a custom studio (Sanity or Storyblok). Update text, images, and cases without ever touching a line of code or compromising site speed.

features.title: Multi-Page Architecture
features.description: Complex sitemaps, dynamic routing, and perfectly structured internal linking. We build an interconnected ecosystem designed for enterprise-level SEO scaling.

features.title: Advanced Interactions
features.description: Premium GSAP scroll animations, WebGL elements, and page transitions (ViewTransitions) that elevate your brand narrative and keep users engaged longer.

features.title: Future-Proof Scalability
features.description: A component-driven design system engineered with Astro and Tailwind. Your platform is ready to add new features, languages, and pages instantly as your business expands.

finalCta.headline: Ready to dominate your market?
finalCta.subtitle: Let's architect a premium digital experience that sets the industry standard.

hero.titleLight: Designed to scale. Built for ROI.
hero.subtitle: A strategic landing page engineered for growing businesses running ad campaigns. We blend CRO techniques with deep integrations to turn clicks into revenue.

features.title: Conversion Rate Optimization
features.description: Data-driven UX/UI design focused entirely on user psychology. We eliminate friction points to seamlessly guide your visitors toward taking action.

features.title: Deep Integrations
features.description: Seamlessly connect your CRM, email marketing tools, tracking pixels, and payment gateways. No manual work, just pure marketing automation.

features.title: Ad-Ready Architecture
features.description: Optimized experiences with perfect message match for your Google and Meta Ads. We ensure your load times never waste a single cent of your ad spend.

features.title: A/B Testing Ready
features.description: Built with modular sections that allow you to easily test different headlines, offers, and layouts to continuously improve your Return on Ad Spend (ROAS).

finalCta.headline: Ready to scale your campaigns?
finalCta.subtitle: Stop wasting ad spend on slow, confusing pages. Let's build a machine that converts.

hero.subtitle: Your digital asset needs continuous tuning to perform at its peak. We handle fast edge hosting, proactive security updates, and performance monitoring so you can focus on your business.

features.title: Fast Edge Hosting
features.description: Your site is deployed globally on edge networks. This guarantees 99.9% uptime and lightning-fast load times for your users, regardless of their geographical location.

features.title: Proactive Security
features.description: Constant dependency updates and threat monitoring. We patch vulnerabilities before they become a problem, ensuring your data and your users remain strictly protected.

features.title: Performance Monitoring
features.description: We track your Core Web Vitals continuously. If a new content update or third-party script degrades your Lighthouse score, we detect it and optimize it immediately.

features.title: Priority Support
features.description: Get a direct line to your developer. Need to integrate a new tracking pixel, adjust a layout, or consult on technical SEO? Consider us your in-house technical partner.

finalCta.headline: Keep your engine running at 100%
finalCta.subtitle: Don't let your digital asset degrade over time. Partner with us for peace of mind.

designerBanner.text: Let's turn your Figma designs into lightning-fast, pixel-perfect code.

hero.headline: Future-proofing brands for the AI search era with high-performance digital architectures.

items.title: The Strategy
items.description: Search has evolved. We map out your visibility not just for Google, but for AI engines like ChatGPT and Perplexity. We focus on entity optimization to ensure your brand becomes a cited authority.

items.title: The Execution
items.description: We build lightning-fast, mobile-first platforms. Every pixel is optimized for conversions, and every line of code is structured with Schema markup so AI crawlers can easily extract and cite your data.

items.title: The Growth
items.description: You get a digital asset that ranks higher in traditional search, gets recommended by AI assistants, and turns that high-quality, targeted traffic into loyal clients.

values.title: We engineer for AI retrieval
values.description: If an AI crawler cannot read your site, you don't exist in the new web. We deliver clean architecture, structured data, and ultra-fast load times so you are always the primary source.

values.title: We design conversion funnels
values.description: As AI answers more questions directly, the traffic that does reach your site is highly qualified. We build frictionless user experiences that guide these high-intent visitors straight to checkout or contact.

values.title: We build resilient partnerships
values.description: The digital landscape changes daily. Whether adapting to new LLM algorithms, optimizing for AI Overviews, or launching a new campaign, we act as your dedicated technical growth team for the long haul.
